visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short black hair and bangs, wearing a white t-shirt with a dinosaur illustration, performs high-knee exercises in front of a brown leather sofa. A white fluffy dog sits calmly on the sofa cushions. The background features horizontal wooden blinds. (2) The woman stands in the same living room, lifting her white t-shirt to reveal a fake, drawn-on six-pack on her skin. She has a triumphant expression while her hands hold the fabric up. The lighting is bright and even. (3) She holds a yellow bell pepper in her right hand and a red one in her left, appearing fatigued with a pained facial expression. A second woman with long black hair, wearing a black dress with cutouts, enters the frame from the left. (4) The scene shifts to a warehouse retail store (Costco). The woman in black pushes a metal shopping cart filled with several large orange and white bottles of Orange House laundry detergent. High shelves with bulk products are visible. (5) Both women sit at a gray table indoors. They hold a large detergent bottle and point at it while talking to the camera with animated hand gestures. Behind them, shelves with household items and a dinosaur plushie are visible. (6) Extreme close-up shots of the detergent bottle's orange cap and the thick, clear liquid being poured into a washing machine drawer. The white plastic of the machine and the orange detergent container are clearly visible. (7) The two women are back on the leather sofa, holding a freshly laundered white t-shirt. They take turns burying their faces in the fabric to smell it, showing expressions of delight. The white dog remains on the sofa.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 努力運動會變瘦. (2) [Subtitle]: 認真吃菜才會變瘦. (3) [Subtitle]: 我的天啊. [Subtitle]: 你怎麼變得又髒又臭啊. [Logo]: Shirumarudashi 904. [Variety]: 衣服髒兮兮. (4) [Subtitle]: 夏天嘛... [Subtitle]: 乾淨整潔才會讓人喜歡! (5) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好市多橘子工坊除臭酵素洗衣精限時特價中趕快來買. [Variety]: 必買特價! [Slogan]: 太便宜了吧. (6) [Subtitle]: 你的皮膚也會癢癢不舒服嗎? [Subtitle]: 衣服緊貼肌膚想要穿得舒適又不會引起敏感刺激. (7) [Subtitle]: 你需要成分天然又安心的橘子工坊除臭酵素洗衣精. [Slogan]: 橘子工坊除臭酵素洗衣精. (8) [Slogan]: 7/14~7/20 店內促銷 實體售價$539 折後後$419. (9) [Subtitle]: β-胡蘿蔔素除臭因子 [Subtitle]: True Clean 動態除臭科技. [Slogan]: 去除常見6大異味 不用香精就有強大的除臭效果. (10) [Subtitle]: 天然微胞橘油搭配天然酵素深入瓦解衣物纖維頑垢. [Slogan]: 深入瓦解衣物纖維頑垢. (11) [Subtitle]: 99.9%制菌病毒+AB流感病毒 低敏配方制菌力強. (12) [Subtitle]: 媽咪寶寶全家人都能安心使用! [Slogan]: 美國PCR低敏驗證. (13) [Subtitle]: HE低泡配方更適合用在滾筒洗衣機不用擔心衣服洗完還有泡泡殘留. (14) [Subtitle]: 不論多髒的衣物都可以變得潔白乾淨. [Slogan]: 洗前沾染明顯污漬 vs 洗後潔白對比. (15) [Subtitle]: 汗味、體味全部不見而且聞起來超天然舒服. [Variety]: 洗淨6大異味. (16) [Subtitle]: 讓我們一起穿上健康洗淨的衣服迎接整個夏天吧要買要快喔. [Variety]: 迎接整個夏天吧.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two female creators appearing together throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has short black hair with bangs, wears a white dinosaur t-shirt; the other has long black hair and wears a black dress with side cutouts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic living room with a brown leather sofa and blinds; a brightly lit Costco warehouse with shelving and metal carts; a laundry area with a modern washing machine.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy synth-pop music with a driving beat begins immediately. A female voice speaks rapidly and enthusiastically. (2) A bright 'ding' bell sound effect marks the appearance of text on screen. (3) A sudden 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a fast visual transition. (4) A sharp, realistic 'crunch' sound effect is heard as the speaker bites into a vegetable. (5) A dramatic cartoon 'impact' sting occurs when a new character enters. (6) A professional male voiceover begins delivering promotional details with clear, crisp articulation over the BGM. (7) A 'pop' UI sound effect plays as pricing graphics appear. (8) Clear liquid sloshing and pouring sounds are heard as product is used. (9) A series of 'bubble' SFX highlights product features. (10) A final musical flourish and a resonant bell chime conclude the track.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Orange House deodorizing detergent available at Costco. The video uses a comedic lifestyle opening about sweat and diet to transition into a detailed showcase of the product's cleaning power and limited-time promotional pricing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, mention of brand name and specific retailer (Costco), and inclusion of sale price and dates.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced social media advertisement leveraging the 'comedy to promo' format to maintain viewer engagement while providing detailed product specs.
